source: RMC-BestFit/src/RMC.BestFit/Diagnostics/PosteriorPredictiveCheck.cs @ c2e6192 -- X12 exact oracle, emitter-verified against the real RMC.BestFit PosteriorPredictiveCheck and reproduced bit-identically by the C++/R/Python runners. A quick seeded DEMCzs MCMC over the Normal model supplies the posterior; 200 replicate datasets are drawn (seeded MersenneTwister) and the common mean/SD/skewness/min/max posterior predictive p-values are computed. The p-values are DISCRETE fractions (multiples of 1/200), so the tiny chaotic chain sensitivity does not perturb them -- they + has_misfit reproduce exactly (abs 1e-9) across C#/C++/R/Python. predictive_replicates == 200.
